Dear Member,
This is a reminder that your borrowed book "The Alchemist" is due tomorrow at 5 PM. Please return it to the library counter or renew online. Thank you!
spam: Hi, aapka credit limit ₹25,000 tak badha diya gaya hai. Verfy karne ke liye <URL> par click kare aur OTP daale. Jaldi kare!
